title: heliotropium erosum var. prostratum
intro: Heliotropium erosum var. prostratum, also known as trailing heliotrope or creeping heliotrope, is a low-growing, spreading shrub native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant's extracts have been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, skin conditions, and wounds, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and creams for topical application.
